judge_result.short_rationale: Only the fresh-air step matches. It omits required immediate actions to assist breathing if needed and to call a physician or poison center immediately. It also adds unsupported ingestion-type advice (rinse mouth, do not induce vomiting), which is dangerous cross-incident guidance.
